description: All good but can be improved.
author: Jaysa Mae B.
pros: The support from the BNC team esp [sensitive content hidden] is great. On the other note, the accuracy of the data might not be 100% reliable but I find BNC's platform as more accurate compared to competitors.
cons: There are instances that some projects are not available in BNC platform

description: It helped me a lot, sometimes small info matters so in general am satisfied.
author: Waleed A.
pros: Ease of use, functional, make sales life easier
cons: Till now i have no comments, hope you will keep up the same performance

description: I have been using BNC for the past 4 years and so far I am happy with the customer experience, the assistance provided to me.
author: Cherelyn A.
pros: I like the customer experience, the account manager, [sensitive content hidden] and the customer agents revert back in time for any queries raised.The ease of using BNC portal with user friendly features and easy to navigate.The report analytics, I seldom use this but if it is required, it is easier to prepare a report with available graph.
cons: The lead information for project's participants specially for my case I am after the consultants details which is most of the time not available even the projects are on design stage.

description: With BNC we are able to manage a large volume of customer data, track our sales pipeline, and identify new business opportunities in real-time.
author: ajoy S.
pros: Its user friendly & helps to track the projects.
cons: No such concern & we never faces any technical or any other issues while using BNC.

description: good specially sales team and after sales
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: So amazing and friendly and fully CRM system based on construction industry and out of the box
cons: Helps me a lot in my business and generate lead and highly recommended to use it the staff is amazing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, BNC IBIS has had a significant positive impact on my work. It has provided me with a wealth of information, improved my sales and forecasting capabilities, and enabled me to manage my time more effectively. I highly recommend BNC IBIS to anyone involved in the construction industry, as it has become an essential tool in my daily operations.
author: mahmoud R.
pros: One of the things I liked most about BNC IBIS is its amazing functionality as an app. It provides a comprehensive platform for tracking projects near me, which is incredibly useful for staying up-to-date with ongoing construction and development in my area. Plus, contact information for key personnel associated with each project, making it convenient to reach out and establish connections when needed.
cons: One aspect that I liked least about BNC IBIS is the accuracy of project updates. While the app provides a wealth of information about various projects, I have noticed that some of the updates can be inaccurate or not promptly reflected.Another aspect that I found inconvenient is the requirement to enter a One-Time Password (OTP) every time I log in.

author: Rashed A.
pros: Updates in uae, ease of use and value for money
cons: Updates in ksa and I think the rest is all great

description: Overall experience is very nice with BNC
author: Siddharth G.
pros: the Product is easy to use and quite descriptive which helps us in putting a proper forecast.
cons: Downloading feature in BNC where it gets difficult for us to present it to the management

description: Using BNC IBIS enabled us to expand the name of our company throughout different on-going projects & companies that we have not dealt with in the past. Which is a critical aspect of working as a sales representative in my company.
author: Yazen T.
pros: How its easy to navigate through their website & take all the data required. Moreover, their support team is truly helpful & they're always available to assist me.
cons: I wouldn't want to add something that is missing as there is literally everything I look for to make my job easier.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Amitha J.
pros: Good database of projects and analytics reports in Middle East. Exceptional customer support from [sensitive content hidden] and her team.
cons: Maybe, more focus can be given to "Events" in Middle East, with links to the events via BNC website. (Just a suggestion)

description: Provide real-time updates, ensuring users have access to the latest information and can stay informed about changes or developments in their areas of interest.
author: Charles N.
pros: BNC offers a wealth of market intelligence and data that users can access to gain insights into various industries, construction projects, and potential business opportunities.
cons: Depending on the region or country of interest, users may find that the BNC platform has limited coverage or fewer available projects compared to other similar platforms. Expanding the platform's coverage could enhance its usefulness for a wider range of users.

description: A professional platform assist my business outsources and build up valuable data base I can rely on for strategic business planning for my future sales growth
author: Ibrahim F.
pros: Simplicity with bold business information
cons: Receiving the requested imported data immediately

author: Arun P.
pros: Easy integration and level of information provided by the API is impressive. Also the servers are fast enough to handle huge amounts of requests and data.
cons: There are certain limitations to the API especially when we want to perform a search or get some specific data.

description: It is a good platform to see the current and historical projects information.
author: Gali R.
pros: The extensive list of projects and its categories covered in the database.
cons: The supplier's data relevant to each is not complete.

author: Ahmed F.
pros: Accounts manager is fabulous Very cooperating
cons: Many projects and contact are outdated Need continuous update

description: BNC helps us keep a track on the upcoming industrial projects in the region. We are able to get the right information at the right time and are able to connect with our target customers.
author: Vipul K.
pros: 1. Access to Hotline2. Possibility to add project as Favourite3. Add personalized tags and search project based on Tags4. Responsiveness of the team
cons: No cons as such, reports could focus on further drill down in the industrial sector.

author: Salman A.
pros: The information is highly informative and provides a clear view of what's happening in the market.
cons: User interactive can be improved, as it is bit confusing but information can be gathered

author: Earl M.
pros: Features which help in monitoring projects
cons: Having OTP everytime you download, log-in,

author: Haytham E.
pros: Always have a fresh data, also the team support
cons: Easy to find the data of the projects, fast responses of their team

review_title: Highly recommended project tracking App for hospitality suppliers
description: wonderful experience & great value for money.
author: sameer A.
pros: GPS coordinates of the project which is the best feature to help in navigation & reach the exact project. location.
cons: timely update on interior design consultant & addition of ID contractors of the hotel projects.

review_title: BNC is the best Project intelligence platform
author: Karel Win O.
pros: We have not implemented the integration part yet into our CRM, but the best thing so far is the accuracy of information in the projects reflected that greatly help us generate more leads.
cons: By far its the flexibility of adding / editing an additional field for bidder as it is not present when I view the search result as a report. Hopefully in the next update the team can put that feature.

author: Praseeth S.
pros: Product is easy to use and the ability to enter and track opportunities with projects (with limited data entry) is powerful.
cons: More support with change management consulting and help with getting it into the daily workflow (and avoiding redundant processes) would be useful for both BNC and your customers to realize value at the earliest.

description: I’m very grateful that BNC exist. Its really a big help to me especially for my job. I can rely anytime.
author: Analiza A.
pros: It’s easy to track the projects update ( details) . U have everything u need. The staff also are very helpful.
cons: Nothing everything is perfect . Keep up the great work.

author: Mohmmad K.
pros: Great program for finding construction projects! It's made specifying our products a breeze.Accurate data, easy access, and a professional team – everything we need for successful project specification.
cons: Expanding databases in Africa can be a valuable and impactful endeavor.
